zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Harington於1405年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾多卡斯特時，她的父親Sir James Harington30歲，母親Ellen DeUrswick41歲。她於1420年與Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1446年在英國波克夏布雷享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏布雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Harington于1405年出生在英国英格兰越可爾多卡斯特时，她的父亲Sir James Harington30岁，母亲Ellen DeUrswick41岁。她于1420年与Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1446年在英国波克夏布雷享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏布雷。

nameMeanings.name: Harington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Harington was born in 1405, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir James Harington, was 30 and her mother, Ellen DeUrswick, was 41. She married Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke in 1420. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1446, in Bray, Berkshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Bray, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Harington est née en 1405, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James Harington, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ellen DeUrswick, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke en 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1446, à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Harington 1405 in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Harington 30 und ihre Mutter Ellen DeUrswick 41. Sie hat 1420 Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1446 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Bray, Berkshire, England und wurde in Bray, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Harington è nata il nel 1405 nel Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir James Harington, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Ellen DeUrswick, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke nel 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1446, nel Bray, Berkshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Bray, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Haringtonが1405年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターで生まれた時，父Sir James Haringtonは30歳，母Ellen DeUrswickは41歳であった。1420年にSir William Le Norreys Of Spekeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1446年にイギリスバークシュアイアブレイで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Harington(이)가 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Harington(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen DeUrswick(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1420년 Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1446년 영국 버크실르 브라이에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 브라이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Harington nasceu em 1405, em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir James Harington, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ellen DeUrswick, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke em 1420. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1446, em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Harington родилась в 1405 г. в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir James Harington было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen DeUrswick, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke в 1420 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1446 г. в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Harington nació en 1405, en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir James Harington, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ellen DeUrswick, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Sir William Le Norreys Of Speke en 1420. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1446, en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
